source.title: We are the cause of Our Problems
source.speaker: Śrīla Bhaktivedānta Nārāyaṇa Gosvāmī Mahārāja

segments.transcript: So, and now I'm hearing so many from the mouth of devotees, "Oh, there are so many problems. My wife has left me. Now my children are like orphan." So many problems. Some lady devotees coming, "Oh, very big problem. My husband has left me. I have nothing to do. What should I do? Can you help?" So many problems, so many problems. They try to this, do this, that, but everywhere fail. Everywhere fail because the root of all these problems is that you are not Saranagat. You have no relation with Kṛṣṇa, and you have no trust in Kṛṣṇa, no belief in Kṛṣṇa and His name. That is all problems coming.

Kṛṣṇa has not advised you that, oh, you are Brahmacārī for thirteen, fourteen, twenty years in math of Swamiji, your Prabhupāda. He was so merciful, and he engaged. Has he told that you should go and marry? Kṛṣṇa has advised you that make a boyfriend or girlfriend? Has He told? Hmm? Who brought all these problems? Myself. Yourself only. You make problems all. If you are like this, always serving Kṛṣṇa and depending on Kṛṣṇa, any problem cannot come.

Can any problem come for Śukadeva Gosvāmī? Any problem for Nārada Gosvāmī? Always depending on Kṛṣṇa. So anyone, we are also dependent on Kṛṣṇa. That is why no problem at all. To whom we touch, problems go. What is the meaning of touching? If you want to touch, then you should try to follow from today that Kṛṣṇa is Supreme Personality of Godhead. He has created whole world, and He's supporting, nursing whole. Then why He cannot support you and nourish you? Why problems? It is that you are making all problems. You are the root cause of all problems. Kṛṣṇa wants to take you out of problems, but you are making.

There was only son, then you were not satisfied. Again, two daughters, one son, again more, and they, they become some mature they were, and they were deadly against you, with you and your, her mothers. Making so many problems now. So for this, you should be Saranagat. Name is more merciful than Kṛṣṇa, you should know. More, more, more merciful. Kṛṣṇa had invested His all mercy, power, opulence, everything, His mercy in Kṛṣṇa name, but you are neglecting. You are depending on your own job and making some money, and this making money, making more problems. Problems after problems after problems.

You can realize all these things because Śāstra has told all these things. You cannot be happy by this, solving all these problems. Only one problem is the root of all what? You have forgotten Kṛṣṇa. You are neglecting Kṛṣṇa, Kṛṣṇa name. Especially Kṛṣṇa name in this Kali-yuga. Chant like Haridāsa Ṭhākura, and you will see that Lakṣmī will come and follow you. "Oh, how can I serve you?" Have you this faith? We have this faith, and that is why Lakṣmī is always with us. But we told that, "Wait a little. I have no service." "Please be very far away." We also fear from the shadow of Lakṣmī Devī. What to tell Lakṣmī Devī? You should be like that, and you will see all very, very good, very good. No problem at all. No problem at all. Kṛṣṇa will quickly solve all the problems.

natural_questions: Why do I have so many problems in life?
What is the root cause of all my suffering?
Why am I always failing despite trying everything?
Why does nothing work out for me?
qa_pairs.answer_summary: The root of all problems is lack of śaraṇāgati (surrender). No relation with Kṛṣṇa, no trust in Kṛṣṇa, no belief in Kṛṣṇa and His name.

natural_questions: Who is responsible for my problems?
Did Krishna cause my suffering?
Why did God give me these difficulties?
Is karma responsible for my problems?
qa_pairs.answer_summary: You yourself are the cause. Kṛṣṇa never advised you to deviate from devotional service. If you always serve Kṛṣṇa and depend on Him, no problem can come.

natural_questions: Can a devotee really be free from all problems?
Did great saints have problems?
How were the Gosvāmīs free from suffering?
Is it really possible to live without problems?
qa_pairs.answer_summary: Śukadeva Gosvāmī and Nārada Gosvāmī had no problems because they always depended on Kṛṣṇa. Kṛṣṇa created and supports the whole world — He can certainly support you.

natural_questions: Is Krishna's name more powerful than Krishna Himself?
Why should I chant the Holy Name?
How is nāma more merciful than Kṛṣṇa?
Why is chanting important?
qa_pairs.answer_summary: Kṛṣṇa's name is more merciful than Kṛṣṇa Himself. Kṛṣṇa invested all His mercy, power, opulence — everything — into His name. But we neglect it and depend on material means instead.

natural_questions: How can I solve all my problems?
What is the solution to suffering in Kali-yuga?
How do I become free from all difficulties?
What should I do to overcome my troubles?
qa_pairs.answer_summary: The one root problem is forgetting Kṛṣṇa. Chant like Haridāsa Ṭhākura and Lakṣmī herself will come to serve you. Have faith in Kṛṣṇa nāma, especially in Kali-yuga, and Kṛṣṇa will quickly solve all problems.

natural_questions: What is śaraṇāgati?
What does it mean to surrender to Krishna?
How do I surrender to God?
What does taking shelter mean?
qa_pairs.answer_summary: Śaraṇāgati means having a real relation with Kṛṣṇa, trusting Him completely, believing in His name, and depending fully on Him rather than material arrangements. Without this, all problems persist.

natural_questions: What is the example of Haridāsa Ṭhākura?
How did Haridāsa Ṭhākura chant?
What can we learn from Haridāsa Ṭhākura?
Tell me about Haridāsa Ṭhākura and chanting
qa_pairs.answer_summary: Chant like Haridāsa Ṭhākura with full faith. When you do, Lakṣmī Devī will come and ask how she can serve you. The truly surrendered devotees even tell Lakṣmī to stay away — they have no need for material wealth.

natural_questions: Why do devotees still face problems?
I am chanting but still have difficulties
Why is bhakti not solving my problems?
I am a devotee but life is still hard
qa_pairs.answer_summary: The problems come from not fully depending on Kṛṣṇa. If we deviate from pure service — pursuing material relationships, money, comfort — problems follow. The Gosvāmīs who fully depended on Kṛṣṇa had zero problems.

natural_questions: Can money solve my problems?
Should I focus on earning more to fix my life?
Will a better job solve my difficulties?
Is financial security the answer?
qa_pairs.answer_summary: Depending on your own job and making money creates more problems, not fewer. Problems after problems after problems. The solution is surrender to Kṛṣṇa nāma, not material accumulation.

natural_questions: Does Krishna want to help me?
Does God care about my problems?
Will Krishna help me if I surrender?
Is Krishna willing to solve my difficulties?
qa_pairs.answer_summary: Kṛṣṇa wants to take you out of problems. He actively desires to help you. But you keep creating new problems through material attachment. Stop making problems, surrender, and Kṛṣṇa will act.
